title: CropXP
description: Awards XP when harvesting fully grown crops in a simple, vanilla-friendly way.
body:
# CropXP

CropXP is a tiny, vanilla-friendly Fabric mod that makes farming a little more rewarding.

Whenever you break a **fully grown crop**, it drops a small random amount of experience: **1-3 XP**.

## Features

- Awards XP for harvesting mature crops
- Only triggers on fully grown crops
- Keeps vanilla farming simple and balanced
- No new blocks, items, or extra mechanics

## Why use CropXP?

Vanilla farming is useful, but harvesting crops normally gives no direct experience. CropXP adds a small reward loop that makes farming feel better without turning it into an overpowered XP system.

## Compatibility

- **Minecraft:** 1.21.11
- **Loader:** Fabric
- Designed for vanilla-style gameplay and lightweight modpacks
